LANDING.DESCRIPTION: From languages to logic. I am a Translator and Interpreter turned Web Developer, fusing linguistic precision with digital architecture.

HOME.SUBTITLE: Fullstack Development with attention to detail.
HOME.INTRO_TEXT: Here you will find a journey through my professional and technical background. I have designed this space so you can explore my work interactively.
HOME.ABOUT_DESC: Discover my story: how I transitioned from linguistic translation to mastering code architecture, and which technologies make up my main stack.
HOME.PROJECTS_DESC: Explore my latest developments. In each card, you will see the applied technologies and a direct link to the source code on GitHub.
HOME.CONTACT_DESC: Do you have a project in mind or are you looking for a hybrid profile for your team? Let's get in touch.

ABOUT.TITLE: Professional Journey
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: From language interpretation to code architecture. My multidisciplinary background allows me to approach technical projects with a global perspective and clear, effective communication.  {{value}} years of experience.

CORDOBA.TEXT: Bachelor’s Degree in Translation and Interpreting – University of Córdoba.

MUNSTER.TEXT: Erasmus program at the University of Münster – Linguistic and cultural immersion in Germany.

TRANSLATION.TEXT: Graduation and first professional steps in the translation industry.

WEBDEV.TEXT: Higher Vocational Degree in Web Application Development (DAW) – Specialization in modern technologies such as Angular.

PLEXUS.TEXT: Developer at Plexus Tech – Building scalable digital solutions.

01.SUBTITLE: Media collection management app
01.DESCRIPTION: Digital platform designed to store, organize, and manage collections of books and video games. It allows users to register titles, categories, and statuses, providing easy access and control through an intuitive interface.

02.SUBTITLE: 3D reconstruction of the Roman aqueduct of Mérida
02.DESCRIPTION: Three-dimensional model of the Aqueduct of the Miracles, one of the most representative Roman engineering works in Mérida. The project recreates its structure, proportions, and materials using Blender, with the aim of studying its architecture and applying 3D rendering techniques.

08.subtitle: Frontend Application
08.description: Figma design project focused on creating a web page layout.

06.subtitle: Countdown Timer
06.description: Countdown timer that tracks time remaining until a specific date.

07.SUBTITLE: Computer products store
07.DESCRIPTION: Web-based online store dedicated to the sale of computer products. It features a technology product catalog with detailed information and a user-oriented interface.

09.subtitle: CSS Prototype
09.description: CSS prototype based on the corporate website of Fonsaex.

10.subtitle: Kanban Prototype
10.description: Design and layout of a Kanban board inspired by real-world tools.

03.subtitle: Craft Workshop Project
03.description: Web project focused on presenting a craft workshop with a modern, responsive design.

04.subtitle: Experimental GSAP Project
04.description: Project focused on advanced animations, transitions, and visual effects to enhance user experience.

05.subtitle: Simple JavaScript Game
05.description: Game with basic mechanics, event handling, and state management implemented in JavaScript.
